title: ipomoea coptica subvar. malvifolia
intro: Ipomoea coptica subvar. malvifolia, also known as Convolvulus malvifolius, is a species of flowering plant in the morning glory family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea coptica subvar. malvifolia include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing stress. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
